basic_details.job_title: KCG Gujarat Professor of Practice Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Knowledge Consortium of Gujarat (KCG Gujarat) has officially announced the Professor of Practice Recruitment 2026. The detailed notification has been released for the engagement of eligible professionals under the contract-based recruitment process. Candidates with a minimum of 15 years of senior-level experience in any field are eligible to apply online. Interested applicants can submit their applications up to 15-06-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are provided below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Minimum 15 years of senior-level experience in any field. Formal academic qualifications are not required if the candidate has outstanding professional experience.
qualification.details: Professor of Practice: At least 15 years of senior-level experience in any field such as science, entrepreneurship, business, social sciences, media, literature, fine arts, civil services, armed forces, legal profession, public administration, or any other relevant field. Formal academic qualifications (like degrees) are NOT required for this post if the candidate has outstanding professional experience in the concerned field.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.1,000/- per lecture, with a maximum of Rs.4,000/- per day and a maximum of Rs.80,000/- per month.
salary_details.details: Rs.1,000/- per lecture Maximum Rs.4,000/- per day Maximum Rs.80,000/- per month

selection_process: Online application submission Shortlisting based on merit Interview conducted by KCG office Demo teaching/presentation Selection committee verification and merit list preparation
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the KCG Gujarat Professor of Practice Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 15-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of KCG Gujarat to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Professor of Practice position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Professor of Practice position is 15th June 2026. Ensure all required documents are uploaded and the form is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum experience requirements for this role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a minimum of 15 years of senior-level experience in any relevant field. Outstanding professional experience can substitute for formal academic qualifications.

faq.question: Q3. Is there an age limit for applicants?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify an age limit for this recruitment. It is advisable to check the detailed advertisement for any specific age criteria or relaxations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Professor of Practice position is strictly online. Candidates need to visit the official recruitment portal to fill out and submit their applications.

faq.question: Q5. How is the salary structured for the Professor of Practice role?
faq.answer: The salary is structured on a per-lecture basis, with a maximum daily and monthly earning potential. This includes Rs.1,000/- per lecture, up to Rs.4,000/- per day, and a maximum of Rs.80,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Are formal academic qualifications mandatory for this post?
faq.answer: No, formal academic qualifications are not mandatory if a candidate possesses outstanding professional experience in the relevant field, meeting the 15-year senior-level experience requirement.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Professor of Practice position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves online application submission, shortlisting based on merit, an interview, a demo teaching/presentation, and final verification by a selection committee for merit list preparation.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the 'Important Links' section of this article. It contains comprehensive details about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The job type for the Professor of Practice position is contract-based, offering a flexible engagement for experienced professionals.

faq.question: Q10. Who is the recruiting organization for this vacancy?
faq.answer: The recruiting organization for this vacancy is the Knowledge Consortium of Gujarat (KCG Gujarat), an esteemed body focused on educational development in the state.
